title: Alphabet Blocks
description: A mod that adds 78 alphabet blocks (A to Z) in 3 colors: black, yellow and green. Two brushes allow you to paint black blocks into yellow or green by right clicking on them. A special tool called Destroy Letter can instantly remove any letter block.
body:
**Alphabet Block Mod**
A mod that adds alphabet blocks (A to Z) in 3 colors.
**Blocks**

78 letter blocks in total (26 letters × 3 colors)
- Black color — base version
- Yellow color — yellow painted version
- Green color — green painted version
- All blocks are unbreakable normally

**Items**

- Yellow Brush — right click on a black letter block → transforms it into yellow
- Green Brush — right click on a black letter block → transforms it into green
- Destroy Letter — left click on any letter block (black, yellow or green) → instantly removes it
